note: Pass-2 adversarial cases re-executed by the Ultragoal leader after the QA subagent stalled and was cancelled; pass-1 subagent evidence retained where still valid.

cases.scenario: Manifest whose required file appears only as a non-positional argv token (bun test --timeout <file>)
cases.evidence: run-test-manifest exit=1: 'Manifest required file is not an executable command: packages/coding-agent/test/notifications-chat-adapters.test.ts'

cases.scenario: Manifest omitting chat-adapters from commands while keeping the required list
cases.evidence: run-test-manifest exit=1 with the same required-file diagnostic

cases.scenario: Attacker excludes chat-adapters with a rationalized exclusion
cases.expected: Generator --check fails (exclusion cannot satisfy required coverage)
cases.evidence: generate-telegram-baseline-manifest --check exit=1 listing notifications-chat-adapters.test.ts among missing files

cases.scenario: Hand-edited manifest omitting chat-adapters from both commands and required
cases.evidence: generate-telegram-baseline-manifest --check exit=1 listing all 40 missing discovered files

cases.scenario: Structural rename scanner plus docs-index embedded filenames check
cases.expected: Scanner passes; index embeds sdk.md and sdk-embedding.md, not notifications-sdk.md
cases.evidence: verify-gjc-sdk-rename.ts: 'GJC SDK rename verification passed.'; EMBEDDED_DOC_FILENAMES check: sdk.md=true, sdk-embedding.md=true, notifications-sdk.md=false

cases.scenario: Heaviest Telegram suite after all fixes
Public SDK exports preserved; legacy deep-import rejected (pass-1 evidence, unchanged surface)
cases.expected: sdk + sdk/bus resolve; old notifications subpath fails
cases.evidence: Pass-1: createAgentSession=function via @gajae-code/coding-agent/sdk; legacy notifications/lifecycle-commands import rejected; pass-2 sdk-package-exports.test.ts still green (83 focused tests)

cases.scenario: Native NotificationServer endpoint under <root>/sdk with 0600 + token; no legacy dir (pass-1 evidence, native binding unchanged since rebuild)
cases.expected: state/sdk endpoints; agent-dir notifications control plane intact
